utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: We were on the platform , ready to dance the world into the new Millennium , and the guy yelled CUT !

emotion_cause.span: 1_We were on the platform , ready to dance the world into the new Millennium , and the guy yelled CUT !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Uh , wait , so you guys are telling me you actually did the routine from eighth grade ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_you actually did the routine from eighth grade ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yeah . But of course we had to update it a little bit . Hey , by the way , great thinking about catching me !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Cos I was gonna say there is no way you could have done the end the way you guys did it back then !

emotion_cause.span: 4_there is no way you could have done the end the way you guys did it back then !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I do not know , I mean you were a lot bigger , I mean , stronger back then .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I can do it , okay ? Come on , let go .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Now you do that , you are on TV .
